justification: The chainwide slotting phase for MF-BV-102 is authorized under PROMO-2026-Q1-003 at $42,000 and distribution is confirmed (1,240 stores effective 2025-12-08) — on the merits this claim is valid. However, $42,000 exceeds the $10,000 auto-settlement threshold, so it must route to a human approver. Escalate with a recommendation to approve in full.
